results.title: Israeli strikes hit south Lebanon, despite ceasefire deal
results.description: People ride an all-terrain vehicle (ATV) moving past destroyed buildings in the village of Deir Qanoun al-Nahr in southern Lebanon.

results.title: India’s Battery Storage Capacity Surges as Grid Flexibility Becomes Central to Renewable Expansion
results.description: India’s battery energy storage sector recorded one of its strongest growth periods in early 2026, with 4.6 GWh of new battery energy storage system (BESS) capacity added in the first quarter, according to Mercom India Research’s Q1 2026 India Energy Storage Landscape Report.

results.title: Shift From Oil to Renewables Defines Aberdeen’s Election Race
results.description: Few places illustrate the tensions of Britain’s energy transition more clearly than Aberdeen in north-east Scotland, where thousands of jobs remain tied to North Sea oil and gas even as governments promise a greener future.

results.title: Madras High Court directs courts to conceal identities in matrimonial disputes involving mental illness
results.description: According to a Daily Thanthi report, the direction was issued by Justices Anand Venkatesh and Ramakrishnan while hearing a petition seeking review of an order passed by a Family Court in a divorce case between a husband and wife.

results.title: MTCP, MOTAC strengthen cooperation on Sarawak tourism development
results.description: PUTRAJAYA: The Sarawak Ministry of Tourism, Creative Industry and Performing Arts (MTCP) has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening cooperation with the federal government in advancing the state’s tourism sector. The commitment was highlighted during an official visit by an MTCP delegation to Tourism, Arts and Culture Ministry’s (MOTAC) Secretary-General, Datuk Shaharuddin Abu Sohot, in Putrajaya. [...]

results.title: Austria beats Jordan 3-1 in their debut at the 2026 FIFA World Cup and takes top spot in Group J with an own goal
results.description: The Austrian national football team began their World Cup group stage journey with a convincing victory. The European team beat Jordan 3-1 in the early hours of Wednesday, in a clash marked by beautiful goals, an unfortunate own goal and a decisive performance from experienced striker Marko Arnautovic. With this result, Austria wins the first [...]

results.title: India's Defence Output Hits Record Rs 1.78 Lakh cr In FY26, Private Sector Share At All-Time High
results.description: Output has more than doubled since FY21 and quadrupled since FY14, as Indian companies emerge as credible suppliers of weapons and equipment to an expanding list of overseas buyers.

results.title: AI use in UK hits 'tipping point' as companies scale up, Google exec says
results.description: Britain is now at a crucial stage for artificial intelligence adoption. Companies are moving beyond just testing AI tools to using them for complex tasks and improving productivity. This shift is happening across various sectors, from retail to government. Experts believe AI can significantly boost productivity for businesses.

results.title: Jeremy Clarkson cancer diagnosis revealed on Clarkson's Farm
results.description: Jeremy Clarkson reveals cancer diagnosis in Clarkson’s Farm, telling co-stars Kaleb Cooper and Charlie Ireland in emotional final episodes.

results.title: Telegram moves Delhi HC against temporary India ban ahead of NEET-UG re-exam
results.description: Authorities have argued that Telegram channels were allegedly being used to circulate leaked or fake question papers, coordinate cheating and spread exam-related misinformation.

results.title: Telegram moves Delhi HC against government ban ahead of NEET re-test, hearing today
results.description: Telegram has challenged the Central government's decision to block its services in India until June 22, citing the impact on over 150 million users amid NEET-UG exam-related concerns. The Delhi High Court has agreed to hear the urgent petition.

results.title: Tucson soccer coach heads to Kansas City to watch Argentina play at the 2026 World Cup
results.description: Tucson youth soccer coach Lautaro Civetta received surprise World Cup tickets to see Argentina play in Kansas City.

results.title: A far-right backlash is surging in Latin America as crime fears fuel Bukele-style crackdowns
results.description: At the start of this decade, Latin America leaned left as progressive politicians gained power amid public outrage over inequities worsened by the pandemic.

results.title: Man Arrested for Allegedly Strangling Live-In Partner in Bengaluru
results.description: A 27-year-old man has been taken into custody in Bengaluru for allegedly killing his live-in partner, a 20-year-old woman named Anusha. The incident reportedly occurred following a series of intense arguments that culminated in violence last week in the Malleswaram area. Sharath, the accused individual, and Anusha had been living together in a rented accommodation [...] The post Man Arrested for Allegedly Strangling Live-In Partner in Bengaluru appeared first on The CSR Journal .

results.title: WiSE programme empowers women entrepreneurs, says Raja Muda of Perlis
results.description: The WiSE programme by MARA and YTF empowers women entrepreneurs to transform small businesses into competitive enterprises with broader market access
